responsibilities.backend_development_pascal: Design and maintenance of back-end systems using Object Pascal, focusing on business logic
responsibilities.api_maintenance: Design, development, and maintenance of RESTful APIs and web services
responsibilities.edi_development: Development of EDI solutions to automate system-to-system data exchange, ensuring data reliability and integrity
responsibilities.database_analysis: Data modeling, query optimization, and performance tuning using PostgreSQL
responsibilities.development_using_ruby_on_rails: Back-end development with Ruby on Rails applying MVC patterns and microservices architecture
responsibilities.frontend_using_html_css_javascript: Development of responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
responsibilities.using_git_plus_heroku: Source control with Git and CI/CD implementation with continuous deployment via Heroku
responsibilities.management_app: Development of web applications with administrative dashboards using Vue.js
responsibilities.maintain_legacy_code: Refactoring, maintenance, and modernization of legacy systems
responsibilities.react_rest_development: Development of React applications integrated with RESTful APIs
responsibilities.fullstack_react_nest: Full-stack development using React on the front-end and NestJS on the back-end, following scalable architecture principles
responsibilities.graphql_api_development: Implementation of GraphQL APIs including schema design, resolver development, and service integration
responsibilities.mongodb_integration: Data modeling and performance optimization using MongoDB, including collection design and query tuning
responsibilities.frontend_architecture_best_practices: Definition and implementation of scalable front-end architecture emphasizing reusable components and performance optimization
responsibilities.backend_endpoint_development: Design and implementation of RESTful endpoints using NestJS and .NET, applying Clean Architecture and software engineering best practices
responsibilities.cms_directus_integration: Front-end development integrated with a headless CMS (Directus), including content modeling, collection design, relationship definition, and API integration
